Class Situations

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.social.sociology.Situations
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class Situations extends Object implements Serializable
Standard social situations and activities. This utility class provides a set of common pre-defined Situation instances used across the sociology module for behavior modeling and simulation.
Since:
1.0
Version:
1.1
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
See Also:
